feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Central Finance
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am looking for possibilities in the integration of S/4HANA Public Cloud and Central Finance. According to the newest SAP Help updates 2502 I can replicate :

  • Replication and initial load of FI/CO documents

  • Replication and initial load of CO documents

  • Replication and initial load of cost objects

  • Comparison reports

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/adb033afc0464aafbdaf3060e08a4d7c.html

This blog also points to the scope item 1W4. When checking out the scope item this doesn't reflect the whole replication but only supplier invoices and clearing processes - looking like intercompany clearing processes. 

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/1W4?region=DE

Also I found all the restrictions applying to the connection: 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3398470

But this is neither stating what is actually possible. 

Does someone has any experience whether we can integrate the Public Cloud System with CFIN for Data Replication looking at FI/CO Documents to use CFIN as "System-of-Record"?

Thanks a lot 

Lena

entry.title: How to consume RAP BO Events of the Document Info Record (DIR) locally in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

actually i am trying to consume a event (locally) of the document info record (DIR) in SAP Public Cloud embedded steampunk. In the Accelerator Hub there are some listed events for the DIR. However i cannot find the Business Object Interface for the DIR with the corresponding events. 

 

Does that mean that the events cannot be consumed at all altough they are listed and released?

 

 

Is there any way to consume this events locally in SAP Public Cloud?

entry.title: BOM更改凭证无法显示
entry.content: BOM存在更改,但是显示BOM并且在BOM的“菜单”-“环境”-“更改凭证”，路径中，更改凭证为灰色，即无法查询BOM的更改凭证，其中BOM抬头产品为“17”，BOM用途为“1”

entry.title: Can you tell me the view where I can check the BP Master Industry and Risk Class?
entry.content:
We are creating a custom CDS for BP master at the request of a customer.
Could you please tell me the view that can obtain the industry information and risk class information registered in the BP master in the image below?

entry.title: Can't select 'Standard Hierarchy Node' in the App Manage Profit Centers
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

i can't select a Standard Hierarchy Node in the App Manage Profit Centers.

But in CBC in "Define Profit Center Standard Hierarchy" there is a Hierarchy YBPH. 

Can someone help me with this? 

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: Is there any equivalent app to J3RKKRD / J3RKKRS on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system and looking for equivalent applications to the following on-premise programs:

J3RKKRD – Russia: G/L Account Balance

J3RKKRS – Russia: G/L Account Line Items

I’ve already searched in the Fiori App Library and found some apps that seem to have similar functionality. However, when I checked the Business Catalog listed in the library, I couldn’t find any matching catalogs available in our public cloud system for role assignment.

I would like to ask:

Are there standard apps in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that are functionally equivalent to J3RKKRD and J3RKKRS?

If yes, what is the Business Catalog associated with them?

If the apps are available in the library but not in our system, is there any way to activate or request them? 

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Professional Services, Add profit to expenses in plan customer project
entry.content:
Hello Professional,

I am facing a problem with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Professional Services . If you know a solution, please let me know.

<Customer requirement>
My client wants to add profit to expenses and bill to customer.

Therefore,
In the app: Plan customer project - Work Package - Expense Type, register expenses (e.g. Accommodation Cost 100 USD, Revenue 150 USD, Billable). Also, set Contract Type as "Time and Expenses (P002)".

In this case, the Client Project Plan app displays the revenue plan correctly (Revenue Plan 150USD).
However, when checking in the app "P&L Plan/Actual (Report)", the column “plan amount” is 100USD registered as cost, not the planned revenue.
Also, when billing in the app "Project Billing Request", the billing amount is the registered cost amount, not the 150USD registered as planed revenue.

Similarly, the revenue recognition is calculated ignoring the 150USD.

Please let me know the solution for customer requirement.

Kind Regards,
Mamoru

entry.title: Can ‘Periodic Postings’ be disabled on Real Estate Contract?
entry.content:
Problem Statement - Would like to check if we can disable ‘Periodic Postings’ on Real Estate Contract.

Business Scenario - No invoicing from SAP CLM. No Accounting Entries should be generated from Real Estate Contract Periodic Postings. 

Expected Solution - Disable PERIODIC POSTINGS of contract from SAP CLM.

Please let us know if there is a way in SAP CLM Cloud version where we can disable Periodic Postings from Real Estate Contracts.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BADI ? to add Pricing Condition records in a PO
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are on S4 Public Cloud and have a business scenario where PO get automatically created upon SalesOrder(SO) creation . In the SO, we manually add custon pricing condition types and are hoping to have these condition types automatically flow into associated PO's. We understand from SAP that custom condition types will NOT flow automatically from SO to PO using config in CBC.

So we are looking at options around how to acheive it using KeyUser/Developer Extensibility but so far I have not come across a BADI in MM area which allows "Addition" of new condition type records. Essentially any Pricing BADI which has conditionType field and its related attributes in Change mode would likely help.

Has anyone come across a similar scenario or aware of a BADI that allows "addition" of new condition type records to a PO.

Appreciate any help.

 

Thanks

RK

entry.title: Can we able to edit standard CDS in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can we able to edit standard CDS view in public cloud?

Thanks,

Nirojan

entry.title: list compatible RF scanners for WM in SAP S4hana in public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We are already using RF scanners in non SAP instance and now we are migrating to WM on SAP S4hana Public cloud 2502. how we will get to know that whether existing scanners will be compatible with S4hana public cloud or not ?

we have scanners named Zebra TC8000 , Zebra M33 and Zebra OLN420.

Will you please guide us how to check compatibility of scanners for WM on S4hana Public cloud 2502 ?

Regards

XXXX

entry.title: File contains element <Nm> that is not defined in the format error while importing bank statement
entry.content:
App Manage incoming payment files error: "file contains element that is not defined in the format."

entry.title: How to view planned scope items to be released per country?
entry.content:
How can we see the planned release for scope items by country?

entry.title: CDS View Required for Total Shelf Life and Minimum Remaining Shelf Life in S/4HANA Cloud ?
entry.content:
CDS View Required for Total Shelf Life and Minimum Remaining Shelf Life.

 

I haven't found Total Shelf Life and Minimum Remaining Shelf Life in CDS I_PRODUCT.

 

Please help us to find Total Shelf Life and Minimum Remaining Shelf Life in CDS view.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Supplier Invoice approval workflow - Invoice currency
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

we have requirement from customer to setup Supplier Invoice approval workflow. The threshold invoice amounts are given in group currency, but in workflow step condition, we have only option to select company code currency. Is there any option to have threshold amounts also in group currency?

Can you please advise?

Thank you!

Best regards,

Gohar

entry.title: Sourcing and Procuremant
entry.content: When making procurement such as placing an order from a quotation within SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, is there a report function that allows you to check the difference between the quotation amount and the order amount when ordering a certain item, as well as the discount rate?

entry.title: BTP App assignment in S4HC Custom Business Roles
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have few apps in BTP UI5 apps those need to be integrated with S4HC custom business roles. Can you provide help with process to archive this requirement.

Could you please provide assistance? Your prompt help would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Veera Anasuri


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Next available ID not suggested while creating a enterprise project.
entry.content:
Recently used projects displayed while creating a new project instead of the next available ID being suggested.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Do we need additional licences for label printing in S4Hana Public cloud 2502 ?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are in process to deploy SAP WM on Public cloud 2502, where we want to have label printing enable for Handling Unit, Putaway, Picking, Shipping, 3PL labels etc. Do we need to go for additional licenses to enable label printing in WM public cloud 2502.

Please advise us best possible approach we can have for label printing in Public cloud.

Regards

XXXX

entry.title: Extended Sourcing for Public Sector for S/4 Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
I read about an "Extended Sourcing for Public Sector", that is announced for Q4 2025, in the SAP Industry Solution Portfolio website (ext. link) .

I would like to confirm if it will be available for S/4 Cloud Public Edition. There is an entry for S/4 (ext. link) and S/4 CLD Private (ext. link), but it does not mention S/4 CLD Public specifically.

Another question is what "S/4 PPS" stands for. Inside the links, it mentions "SAP Ariba Sourcing and Procurement for Public Sector in SAP S/4HANA", but it confuses me because it mentions both Ariba and S/4. I would like to know more about this solution, but I found nothing.
